segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Excuse me, is anyone sitting here?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Also, do you mind if I use this outlet?

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: Not at all. I was just about to unplug anyway.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. I just need to charge my laptop for a bit.

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: Are you working on school stuff?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I'm starting a PhD program, so I'm trying to get organized before classes hit.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. I'm trying not to panic on day two.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: One quick favor - if I run to grab my drink, could you keep an eye on my bag?
